name: eggs-on-toast
input: three fried eggs on two slices of buttered sourdough toast
notes: Western breakfast staple. USDA FoodData Central: large fried egg ~90 kcal × 3 = 270 kcal (P 18g, F 21g); 2 slices sourdough ~160 kcal (C 30g, P 6g); ~10g butter ~70 kcal (F 8g). Composite ~500–550 kcal range. Justification for critical-tier promotion: high prevalence in Western breakfast logging + USDA-precise per-component data.
